fonts.heading: IBM Plex Sans
fonts.instructions: Main agent must install these fonts via Google Fonts. IBM Plex Sans for all structural headings, JetBrains Mono for body, data, extracted text, and coordinates. This enforces a technical 'document scanning' aesthetic.

layout_strategy.grid: Dual-Pane Command Center (Bento Mode B: Control Room)
layout_strategy.description: Left pane (40% width) for the raw PDF/extraction queue. Right pane (60% width) for the active form/verification grid of extracted data.
layout_strategy.spacing: Dense and compact. Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside major containers, but tight gaps (gap-0) between borders to create an exposed grid.
layout_strategy.borders: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Use `border-collapse` style. Elements should share borders (e.g., `border-b border-r border-black`). Avoid rounded corners. Everything is sharp.

component_rules.general: No shadows. No gradients. No rounded corners. Hard 1px solid black or dark grey borders for all containers.
component_rules.shadcn_overrides: In index.css, change `--radius: 0.5rem` to `--radius: 0rem`. Change `--border` to `0 0% 0%`. Change `--background` to `0 0% 100%` and `--foreground` to `0 0% 3.9%`.
component_rules.pdf_upload: Massive dropzone with `border-2 border-dashed border-black`. On hover, background turns `bg-[#F8FAFC]` and border becomes solid.
component_rules.question_list: Do not use standard separated cards. Use a continuous grid where each question is a row with a bottom border. Sub-parts (A, B, C) are indented blocks with left borders.
component_rules.diagrams: Wrap extracted images in sharp boxes with an overline label showing dimensions or 'Fig 1.1'. Image must not overflow.
component_rules.status_tags: Use monospace font, uppercase, 1px solid border, completely flat background.

visual_enhancers.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (sharp/duotone) to match the technical Swiss aesthetic. Install via `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`
visual_enhancers.animations: Minimal. Hover states should invert colors (e.g., white background to black background, black text to white text) instantly. No soft fades.
visual_enhancers.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, uploads, question rows, input fields) MUST include `data-testid` attributes formatted as `kebab-case` and role-based (e.g., `data-testid="pdf-upload-zone"`, `data-testid="approve-question-btn"`).

image_urls.description: Minimalist abstract geometric composition with fine grid lines. Use in empty states, login screens, or as a very low opacity (5%) background watermark.
Close up of complex mathematical equations. Use as placeholder image for the PDF viewing pane before a document is uploaded.
Admin user portrait for the header profile indicator.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'IBM Plex Sans' and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
Override the default shadcn css variables to enforce brutalist/sharp aesthetics (0px radius, black borders).
Build a dual-pane layout using CSS Grid. The left pane should be for uploading and viewing the PDF, the right pane for the data stream (extracted questions).
Do NOT use standard rounded cards with drop shadows. All boundaries should be established by 1px solid black lines.
Ensure `data-testid` is added to EVERY interactive element.
When displaying extracted diagrams, ensure the container handles aspect ratios safely without bleeding text. Use the provided images for empty states or backgrounds.
